title: Suzanne Adams
compiled_truth: Suzanne Adams is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-04-11), Suzanne Adams sent 137 and received 1708 emails, totalling 1845 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (110), [Carol Clair](people/carol-clair) (13), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (13), [Sheila Tweed](people/sheila-tweed) (12), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (10).
